changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-config/src/provider.rs:262-304

Uncovered lines: 270-271, 287, 289, 302-303

```rust
impl ConfigurationProvider for DefaultProvider { fn load_into, fn metadata }
impl ConfigurationProvider for CliProvider { fn load_into, fn metadata }
```

DefaultProvider::metadata returns "defaults", CliProvider::metadata returns "cli". Their load_into methods merge via Serialized::defaults. The existing tests cover the providers partially but miss the metadata() return values and the CliProvider::empty() path. Test: verify metadata names, test CliProvider::empty produces an empty figment, test DefaultProvider::empty produces an empty figment.
Add tests for DefaultProvider and CliProvider load_into/metadata
